title: Eric Ries on TikTok: 'Costco's Founder, When His COO Suggested Raising the Hot Dog Price...'
summary: Eric tells the Costco hot dog story — what happened when the COO floated raising the price during the 2008 financial crisis. Costco is a featured case study in Incorruptible.
blockquote: Costco's founder, when his COO suggested raising the hot dog price during the 2008 financial crisis…
